findings: README points to proof file locations but does not define swarm-state.json required shape; contract lives only in commander agent doc (discoverability gap).
Commander doc example suggests task_id == commander_id ("task_id": "commander-001"), potentially misleading vs guidance to record claimed task_id.
Dual naming schemes: launch_proof uses *_started while telemetry uses *_launched; linkage not explicitly defined.
child-agents.jsonl example omits launch_requested and completed record is schema-minimal vs launch_started records (parser fragility risk).
Heartbeat fields (updated_at/last_heartbeat_at) required but cadence/semantics not specified beyond “keep current”.
